title: Radon action guides - Canada.ca
content:
These radon action guides will help municipalities, provinces and territories develop programs and policies to address radon. They describe broader radon planning and strategy development, and includes appendices with examples and specific guidance to help formulate policy and regulatory change.
The National Radon Program at Health Canada can help municipalities, provinces, and territories develop programs and policies to deal with radon. Get in touch with us for further assistance at radon@hc-sc.gc.ca .
- Radon action guide for municipalities
- Radon action guide for provinces and territories
- Radon action in municipal law
- Justifications and policy rationales for radon action
